description: This file defines the 'Defect' entity class, representing defect reports in a defect management system. It includes properties like severity, status, description, and relationships to users and RCA details, along with JPA annotations for persistence.

classes.name: Defect
classes.description: Entity class representing a defect record with attributes like severity, status, description, report date, location, related users, RCA, and automatic timestamp management.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Automatically updates the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is updated in the database.
